penalties.description: Task was not completed within the maximum time limit of 300 seconds

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude reported incomplete task at 300 seconds while GPT reported completion at 65 seconds. Given the automatic-zero rule for incomplete tasks and Claude's detailed description of partial completion, the incomplete task penalty takes precedence.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment of incomplete task is more detailed and specific about not all rings being returned to original positions

claude_value.description: Task was not completed within the maximum time limit of 300 seconds. Not all rings were transferred back to the original side.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task results in automatic zero score according to FLS rules, and Claude provided specific evidence of partial completion
Incomplete task penalty results in automatic zero score regardless of timing
